title: The Philosophy of David Ondrej
summary: David Ondrej recounts his entrepreneurial journey from gaming and dropshipping to AI. The video covers his philosophical perspectives on competition, authority, religion, geopolitics, and societal trends while reflecting on his pivot to AI during the ChatGPT era.
